revision.comment: use template wrapping to simplify code
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite wikisource 
| _exclude=magazine,issn,vol
| _alias-map = last1:last,first1:first,authorlink:author-link,author1-link:author-link,author1link:author-link,
archiveurl:archive-url,archivedate:archive-date,origyear:orig-year
|magazine=[[Popular Science Monthly]]
| wslink = {{#if:{{{vol|}}}{{{volume|}}}{{{2|}}}
               |{{#if:{{{date|}}}{{{3|}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly/Volume {{if empty|{{{volume|}}}|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{date|}}}|{{{3|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{title|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly}}
               | Popular Science Monthly}}
| title         = {{{1|}}}
| volume        = {{if empty|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}
| date          = {{{3|}}}
| issn          = 0161-7370
| page          = {{{wspage|}}}
| pages         = {{{wspages|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing misc last stuff
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite wikisource 
| _exclude=magazine,issn,vol
| _alias-map = last1:last,first1:first,authorlink:author-link,author1-link:author-link,author1link:author-link,
archiveurl:archive-url,archivedate:archive-date,origyear:orig-year
|magazine=[[Popular Science Monthly]]
| wslink = {{#if:{{{vol|}}}{{{volume|}}}{{{2|}}}
               |{{#if:{{{date|}}}{{{3|}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly/Volume {{if empty|{{{volume|}}}|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{date|}}}|{{{3|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{title|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly}}
               | Popular Science Monthly}}
| title         = {{{1|}}}
| volume        = {{if empty|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}
| date          = {{{3|}}}
| issn          = 0161-7370
| page          = {{{wspage|}}}
| pages         = {{{wspages|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

archiveurl:archive-url,archivedate:archive-date,origyear:orig-year

               |{{#if:{{{date|}}}{{{3|}}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite wikisource 
| _exclude=magazine,issn,vol
| _alias-map = last1:last,first1:first,authorlink:author-link,author1-link:author-link,author1link:author-link,
archiveurl:archive-url,archivedate:archive-date,origyear:orig-year
|magazine=[[Popular Science Monthly]]
| wslink = {{#if:{{{vol|}}}{{{volume|}}}{{{2|}}}
               |{{#if:{{{date|}}}{{{3|}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly/Volume {{if empty|{{{volume|}}}|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{date|}}}|{{{3|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{title|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly}}
               | Popular Science Monthly}}
| title         = {{{1|}}}
| volume        = {{if empty|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}
| date          = {{{3|}}}
| issn          = 0161-7370
| page          = {{{wspage|}}}
| pages         = {{{wspages|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite wikisource 
| _exclude=magazine,issn,vol

archiveurl:archive-url,archivedate:archive-date,origyear:orig-year
|magazine=[[Popular Science Monthly]]

               |{{#if:{{{date|}}}{{{3|}}}

                        | Popular Science Monthly}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite wikisource 
| _exclude=magazine,issn,vol
| _alias-map = last1:last,first1:first,authorlink:author-link,author1-link:author-link,author1link:author-link,
archiveurl:archive-url,archivedate:archive-date,origyear:orig-year
|magazine=[[:en:Popular Science Monthly|Popular Science Monthly]]
| wslink = {{#if:{{{vol|}}}{{{volume|}}}{{{2|}}}
               |{{#if:{{{date|}}}{{{3|}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly/Volume {{if empty|{{{volume|}}}|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{date|}}}|{{{3|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{title|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly}}
               | Popular Science Monthly}}
| title         = {{{1|}}}
| volume        = {{if empty|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}
| date          = {{{3|}}}
| issn          = 0161-7370
| page          = {{{wspage|}}}
| pages         = {{{wspages|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>


[[sn:WsPSM]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite wikisource 
| _exclude=magazine,issn,vol
| _alias-map = last1:last,first1:first,authorlink:author-link,author1-link:author-link,author1link:author-link,
archiveurl:archive-url,archivedate:archive-date,origyear:orig-year
|magazine=[[:en:Popular Science Monthly|Popular Science Monthly]]
| wslink = {{#if:{{{vol|}}}{{{volume|}}}{{{2|}}}
               |{{#if:{{{date|}}}{{{3|}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly/Volume {{if empty|{{{volume|}}}|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{date|}}}|{{{3|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{title|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly}}
               | Popular Science Monthly}}
| title         = {{{1|}}}
| volume        = {{if empty|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}
| date          = {{{3|}}}
| issn          = 0161-7370
| page          = {{{wspage|}}}
| pages         = {{{wspages|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite wikisource 
| _exclude=magazine,issn,vol
| _alias-map = last1:last,first1:first,authorlink:author-link,author1-link:author-link,author1link:author-link,
archiveurl:archive-url,archivedate:archive-date,origyear:orig-year
|magazine=[[:en:Popular Science Monthly|Popular Science Monthly]]
| wslink = {{#if:{{{vol|}}}{{{volume|}}}{{{2|}}}
               |{{#if:{{{date|}}}{{{3|}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly/Volume {{if empty|{{{volume|}}}|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{date|}}}|{{{3|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{title|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly}}
               | Popular Science Monthly}}
| title         = {{{1|}}}
| volume        = {{if empty|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}
| date          = {{{3|}}}
| issn          = 0161-7370
| page          = {{{wspage|}}}
| pages         = {{{wspages|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
[[sn:WsPSM]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite wikisource 
| _exclude=magazine,issn,vol
| _alias-map = last1:last,first1:first,authorlink:author-link,author1-link:author-link,author1link:author-link,
archiveurl:archive-url,archivedate:archive-date,origyear:orig-year
|magazine=[[:en:Popular Science Monthly|Popular Science Monthly]]
| wslink = {{#if:{{{vol|}}}{{{volume|}}}{{{2|}}}
               |{{#if:{{{date|}}}{{{3|}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly/Volume {{if empty|{{{volume|}}}|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{date|}}}|{{{3|}}}}}/{{if empty|{{{title|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}
                        | Popular Science Monthly}}
               | Popular Science Monthly}}
| title         = {{{1|}}}
| volume        = {{if empty|{{{vol|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}
| date          = {{{3|}}}
| issn          = 0161-7370
| page          = {{{wspage|}}}
| pages         = {{{wspages|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<noinclude>

</noinclude>
